leads_email_or_phone.name: leads_email_or_phone
leads_email_or_phone.value: "leads"."email" IS NOT NULL OR "leads"."phone" IS NOT NULL

journal_lines_debit_or_credit.name: journal_lines_debit_or_credit
journal_lines_debit_or_credit.value: ("journal_lines"."debit" IS NOT NULL AND "journal_lines"."credit" IS NULL) OR ("journal_lines"."debit" IS NULL AND "journal_lines"."credit" IS NOT NULL)

journal_lines_amount_positive.name: journal_lines_amount_positive
journal_lines_amount_positive.value: ("journal_lines"."debit" IS NULL OR "journal_lines"."debit" > 0) AND ("journal_lines"."credit" IS NULL OR "journal_lines"."credit" > 0)
